name: Upside Down Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 1/2 ounces Pineapple slices, well drained and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Arrange pineapple slices and cherries in an ungreased 8-inch round pan.
3. In a small saucepan, heat brown sugar and pineapple juice over medium heat until boiling, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and pour the mixture evenly over the biscuits arranged on top of the pineapple slices.
5. Bake for 17-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before serving.
7. Invert onto a serving platter and serve warm or at room temperature.
